summary: Comprehensive testing of ThreatBase/AssetIQ platform - All 25 backend API tests passed, frontend UI tests verified key features including authentication, task planner, form builder, actions, and user management.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. User Management page is at /settings/user-management (not /settings/users). Task Planner date picker works correctly in dialogs. Actions page delete functionality works via dropdown menu and detail page.

authentication.login_logout: PASS - Both owner and admin login work correctly
authentication.password_reset_email: PASS - Forgot password endpoint works, admin reset password endpoint available

user_management.user_list: PASS - Users displayed with Installations column
user_management.reset_password_option: PASS - Available in user dropdown menu
user_management.manage_installations: PASS - Available in user dropdown menu

task_planner.create_plan_dialog: PASS - Opens correctly with date picker
task_planner.date_picker_in_dialog: PASS - Calendar opens and Today button works
task_planner.edit_plan: PASS - Edit option available in plan menu
task_planner.generate_schedule: PASS - Button visible and API working

form_builder.create_form_template: PASS - Dialog opens with discipline dropdown
form_builder.add_field: PASS - Field type dropdown works correctly
form_builder.field_types: PASS - Text, Numeric, Dropdown options available

actions_page.delete_button: PASS - Available in dropdown menu and detail page
actions_page.action_detail: PASS - Navigation to detail page works
